testcase.name: test_create_budget_request_draft
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_budget_requests.py:130: in test_create_budget_request_draft assert response.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 201, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid session"} E assert 401 == 201 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
